children.code:
def CreateOrderRecord(user_id: int, items: list, total_price: float) -> int:
    global orders
    # Generate new order ID (incrementing from existing orders)
    if not orders:
        new_id = 1
    else:
        new_id = max(order['order_id'] for order in orders) + 1
    # Create order record
    order = {
        'order_id': new_id,
        'user_id': user_id,
        'items': items,
        'total_price': total_price,
        'status': 'pending'
    }
    # Append to orders list
    orders.append(order)
    return new_id

subprd.purpose: Order Management System
subprd.description:
INPUT FORMAT:
  Format: json
  Description: Input is a JSON object with command and order_data fields, passed to manage_order function.
  Schema:
    command: string (one of: create_order, pay_order, ship_order, complete_order, cancel_order, list_orders, get_user_orders, list_products)
    order_data: object containing optional fields: user_id (int), order_id (int), items (list of {product_id: int, quantity: int}), status_filter (string), user_filter (int), low_stock (bool)
  Examples:
    {"command": "create_order", "order_data": {"user_id": 1, "items": [{"product_id": 2, "quantity": 2}]}}
    {"command": "pay_order", "order_data": {"order_id": 1}}
    {"command": "list_products", "order_data": {"low_stock": true}}

OUTPUT FORMAT:
  Format: json
  Description: Output is a JSON object with success, message, and data fields.
  Schema:
    success: boolean
    message: string describing result
    data: object containing relevant data (e.g., order_id, total_price, products list, etc.)
  Examples:
    {"success": true, "message": "\u8ba2\u5355\u521b\u5efa\u6210\u529f", "data": {"order_id": 1, "total_price": 199.8}}
    {"success": false, "message": "\u5546\u54c1\u5e93\u5b58\u4e0d\u8db3", "data": {"product_id": 1, "available": 10, "requested": 15}}

Functional Requirements:
[FR-001] Create Order: User creates an order with user ID and item list. Checks user existence, product stock, calculates total price, deducts stock, and creates order record with status pending.
[FR-002] Pay Order: User pays for an order. Checks order exists and status is pending, checks user balance, deducts balance, updates order status to paid.
[FR-003] Ship Order: Ship an order. Checks order exists and status is paid, updates status to shipped.
[FR-004] Complete Order: Complete an order. Checks order exists and status is shipped, updates status to completed.
[FR-005] Cancel Order: Cancel an order. Checks order exists and status is pending or paid, restores product stock, refunds balance if paid, updates status to cancelled.
[FR-006] List Orders: List orders with optional filters by user and status. Displays order details including items, total price, status, and time.
[FR-007] Get User Orders: Get all orders for a specific user. Calculates total spent and counts of orders by status.
[FR-008] List Products: List products with info and stock. Can filter low stock items.

Concurrency: single-user, auth_required: False
UI: api
Language: Python
